sentiment: The quiet insistence that where you are belongs to you, and what you build should add to your life, not subtract from it.

stories.title: Virginia bans sale of geolocation data
stories.summary: Virginia passes a law prohibiting the sale of personal geolocation data, setting a new state-level precedent for location privacy.

stories.title: Right to Local Intelligence
stories.summary: An initiative advocating for the right to run AI models locally on personal devices, independent of cloud providers.

stories.title: CarPlay Is Additive
stories.summary: Casey Liss argues CarPlay enhances the driving experience by layering smart features without replacing the car's core interface.
